provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring civilization, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, gentle female reptilian alien with warm amber-brown scales and a smooth low crest, soft amber eyes, a calm relaxed tail, wearing layered dark earth-toned robes with many internal pockets for dried herbs and plant specimens, a mortar and pestle hanging from her belt in a leather case, soft-soled shoes, her hands are stained green from grinding plant matter, she makes medicines from traditional Veshan herbal knowledge and warriors come to her quietly when the surgeons cannot help
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
